title: Windswept
description: A vast expansion to snowy and forested areas of the game.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f75d5e09c35c7a967b5142223b3f4bb76021a43.png)

📖 About:

  • Windswept is a vanilla-esque mod that vastly expands colder regions of the game. It adds new biomes such as Tundras, Pine Barrens, Chestnut Forests, Lavender Fields, and Flowering Savannas, along with new flowers, enemies, and much more—basically a whole bunch of content related to winter!

📖 Cross Content:

  • Caverns & Chasms - Cupric Fairy Light, Frozen Flesh Block, Chilled will Spawn with Silver Armour, Dry Mossy Cobblestone Bricks/Tiles
  • Create - Honey/Chocolate Wooden Buckets
  • Berry Good - Wild Berry Pips
  • Boatload - Additional Boat Variants for new Woodtypes
  • Gallery - Item Textures for all 7 paintings
  • The Endergetic Expansion - Ender Fairy Light
  • Quark - Wooden Block Variants for new Woodtypes
  • Woodworks - Wooden Block Variants for new Woodtypes, Sawmill Recipes for all Wood blocks

📖 Addons:

  • Looking for Farmer's Delight Compat? We have our own addon called Windswept Delights
